do_not_do: inject raw trace logs into every prompt
treat the capsule as Uigwe gate approval
next_action: Run continuity replay gate before claiming long-session continuity behavior is preserved.
objective: Preserve AI working context across King Sejong compaction without replaying raw history.

rejected_options.reason: Human-readable handoff notes can stale and cannot be hook-validated as AI working state.
rejected_options.summary: Use only markdown handoff files after session clear.

rejected_options.reason: Raw replay floods context and can expose private or untrusted evidence.
rejected_options.summary: Replay full trace history into the model after compaction.

selected_decisions.summary: Use a continuity capsule as a compact index over runtime artifacts.
selected_decisions.why: It gives hooks a bounded AI working-set projection without making the capsule a new authority layer.

verification_state.last_verified_claim: Capsule contract, hook projection, helper updates, and replay gate are covered by source-repo fixtures.
